hero.title: Memory Trainer
hero.description: Create memory sessions, recall generated sequences, review performance, and track progress.

differences.title: Make memory practice active
differences.description: Memory Trainer uses practical sequence recall sessions to keep attention, repetition, and review connected.

items.title: Memory games
items.description: Create focused number, word, or color sequence challenges.

items.title: Recall rounds
items.description: Memorize each generated sequence, hide it, then answer from memory.

items.title: Performance review
items.description: Track accuracy, response time, and completed session progress.

feel.title: Active practice through short challenges
feel.description: The experience keeps memory training centered on short sessions, clear recall, and immediate review.

items.title: Create a game
items.description: Choose mode, difficulty, sequence length, and round count.

items.title: Recall the sequence
items.description: Show the prompt, hide it, and enter the remembered order.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: See correct rounds, accuracy, and response timing.

audiences.title: Who uses Memory Trainer
audiences.description: Useful for people who want game-based memory practice.

items.title: Students
items.description: Practice recall and attention through short sequence sessions.

items.title: Curious learners
items.description: Use number, word, and color challenges for memory practice.

items.title: Everyday users
items.description: Add focused memory exercises to a learning routine.

resourceSection.title: Memory-practice essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep games, challenges, and adaptive practice connected.

items.title: Focused rounds
items.description: Persist each sequence, answer, and result.

items.title: Progress summary
items.description: Track completed sessions and best accuracy.

groupedSection.title: A focused memory routine
groupedSection.description: Move from game setup to recall rounds and session review.

items.name: Game
items.description: Set mode, difficulty, sequence length, and rounds.

items.name: Session
items.description: Start a generated challenge from the selected game.

items.name: Answers
items.description: Persist each round answer with correctness.

technicalSection.title: Designed for adaptive memory games
technicalSection.description: Memory Trainer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: App-specific Memory Trainer API and database.

finalCta.title: Ready to train memory?
finalCta.description: Open Memory Trainer and start a practical sequence recall session.
